string.text: You think you're tough, {player}? We've got our eyes on you. Your luck won't last long in {zone}, mark my words.
Shut your mouth, scum! {victim} was ten times the stalker you'll ever be. If I see you in {zone} I'll fill you with lead.
Enjoy it while you can, {player}. You'll be the next one lying dead. We swear vengeance for {victim}.
Good riddance. One less piece of shit roaming around here.
The Zone dishes out justice sometimes. You're next if you're not careful.
Finally someone put that rat down. Good contribution to the network.
What a tragedy, brother... {victim} was a real one. Gotta watch our backs here in {zone}, it's getting rough.
I can't believe it... Rest in peace. Let me know if you need a hand avenging {victim}, {player}.
Fuck, we lost another good one. Thanks for the heads up, {player}, stay safe out there.
Noted. Try to loot quick and get out before the mutants catch the scent.
Thanks for the report, stalker. I'll avoid passing through {zone} for a while.
Tough break... one day you're drinking vodka by the fire, next day you're dog food. Stay safe.
I'll be waiting for you, {player}. In {zone} or wherever, I'll fucking destroy you for what you did to {victim}.
{player}, you son of a bitch. We'll hunt you down like the dog you are. {zone} will become your grave.
Think you're a hotshot, {player}? {victim} was my blood, I swear I'll bury you right next to him in {zone}.
Don't hide, {player}. Word travels fast in {zone}, and everyone knows you wasted {victim}. Your time's up.
Watch where you step, {player}. {zone} won't be big enough to hide from what's coming for you because of {victim}.
Glad to hear it, honestly. Hope the one who caught the bullet suffered good.
Got what he deserved for being stupid. The Zone doesn't discriminate, we all end up as pig food eventually.
One less to worry about. Good on whoever took him down, hope it hurt.
Had it coming. That bastard made life hell for more than a few people around here.
Well done. Hope he suffered, hope he knew who sent him to the other side.
God damn it, {victim} didn't deserve this. He was good people, one of the few left in {zone}.
Hurts my soul, {player}. {victim} and I shared more than one campfire in {zone}. Gonna miss him.
Of all people, {victim}... just when things were calming down in {zone}. The Zone never gives a break.
You don't know how much this hurts. {victim} saved my ass once. If you need anything to honor him, just ask.
What a shame, brother. {victim} went to the stalker's heaven. {zone} lost a real one today.
Noted. Better stay away from {zone} for a while, until the dogs forget the smell of death.
Good looking out. Things are hot in {zone}, better keep your eyes wide open.
Death's always lurking in the Zone. Thanks for the tip, I'll remember it.
Noted. If you see anything weird in {zone} report again, that's what the network's for.
What can you do. {zone} just got one soul lighter. Hope the mutants don't go crazy over the smell.
